Title: Relates to permits and financial security for reclamation for mining on state-owned lands occurring below or beneath navigable waters; repealer
Summary: Relates to permits and financial security for reclamation for mining on state-owned lands occurring below or beneath navigable waters; requires such permits to be subject to environmental quality review procedures; requires financial security to cover any damages directly or indirectly resulting from mining activities on state-owned lands occurring below or beneath navigable waterways, including, but not limited to, those resulting from collapse or water contamination.
LawCode: Amd §§23-2711 & 23-2715, rpld §23-2711 sub 9, En Con L; amd §81, Pub Lds L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the environmental conservation law and the public lands law, in relation to permits and financial security for reclamation for mining on state-owned lands occurring below or beneath navigable waterways; and to repeal certain provisions of the environmental conservation law relating thereto
